question: what years did joe montana win super bowl?
sparql:
#MANUAL SPARQL
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?a
WHERE {
    ns:m.01r6hc ns:sports.pro_athlete.teams ?y .
    ?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.team ?x . #team
    ?x ns:sports.sports_team.championships ?z . # super bowls
    ?z ns:common.topic.notable_types ns:m.01xljv1 . #super bowl
    ?z ns:sports.sports_championship_event.champion ?c .
    ?z ns:time.event.start_date ?a .

  # Check the time overlap
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.from ?sk0} || 
             EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.from ?sk1 . 
             FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk1) - xsd:datetime(?a) <= 0) })

  FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.to ?sk2} || 
             EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.to ?sk3 . 
             FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk3) - xsd:datetime(?a) >= 0 ) }) 
}
